title: 6 Pieces Christmas Pen Christmas Jingle Bell Ballpoint Pen
features: What you get: The package includes 6 Christmas bell ballpoint pens in two styles, one red and one green, with a fun and classic look that brings you more fun when writing and is perfect for Christmas gifts.
Quality: The bells on the top of these ballpoint pens are made of metal for durability and crispness, and the barrels are decorated with satin ribbon for a glossy and comfortable feel.

Beautiful: The bells on the top of each pen are in red, green and silver and are beautifully styled and have coloured feathers glued to the base of the bells in the same colour as the barrel for a fantastic look.

Feature: This Christmas bell pen features a high quality ballpoint refill that produces a continuous stream of ink for smooth, effortless writing and a nib with a sleeve that won't leave scratches when stored.

Application: A beautiful and practical ballpoint pen is perfect for Christmas, adding fun to your writing as well as creating a festive atmosphere to write your wishes on greeting cards so that your thoughts are better conveyed to everyone.
